title: Vivi Is Forced to Leave
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on vivi is forced to leave, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Is Forced to Leave. Luffy stays behind to fight Crocodile for the first time, learning the terrifying gap between resolve and a Warlord’s power. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Are you kidding me!? God, that loser's useless! He better be still alive at least!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ku ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Perfect! Let's go to the front entrance.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The millions still don't know who their boss is.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Whoever said I was going outside as the boss of Baroque Works?

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Some random Millions-agent isn't going to recognize either of us as Baroque Works members.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: As far as they know, they'll see Crocedile the casino owner,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Coming to see what the fuss outside his casino is about.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't worry! There's still some time before this room is completely flooded!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: In the meanwhile, I'll go outside to bring back help!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's right... I somehow doubt Samji was actually killed just now.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If Vivi can just go rescue Samji right now, then...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's right, and there's also Chopper outside. They might be able to do something!

summary: This part develops vivi is forced to leave and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
